all.en: Thank you for registering for our upcoming webinar on digital marketing trends.
all.zh: 感謝您報名參加我們即將舉行的數位行銷趨勢線上研討會。

all.en: This message confirms that your registration has been successfully processed.
all.zh: 本訊息確認您的報名已成功完成。

all.en: The session will be held on Thursday, April 22, from 2:00 to 3:30 p.m. EST.
all.zh: 本場研討會將於 4 月 22 日星期四美東時間下午 2 點至 3 點半舉行。

all.en: The title of the webinar is The Future of Customer Engagement in 2026.
all.zh: 本次研討會主題為「2026 顧客互動的未來」。

all.en: Our featured speaker is Ms. Angela Park, founder of BrightPath Analytics.
all.zh: 本次主講人為 BrightPath Analytics 創辦人 Angela Park 女士。

all.en: She has over fifteen years of experience advising global consumer brands.
all.zh: 她擁有十五年以上為全球消費品牌提供顧問服務的經驗。

all.en: The unique access link is included in the calendar invitation below.
all.zh: 專屬參加連結附於下方的行事曆邀請中。

all.en: Please do not share this link, as it is tied to your individual registration.
all.zh: 請勿分享此連結，因為它已綁定您的個人報名資料。

all.en: We recommend joining the session at least ten minutes before the start time.
all.zh: 建議您於開始前至少十分鐘進入會議室。

all.en: A stable internet connection of at least five megabits is suggested.
all.zh: 建議使用至少 5 Mbps 的穩定網路連線。

all.en: You may test your audio and video using the link in our help center.
all.zh: 您可透過協助中心的連結測試音訊與視訊。

all.en: The first thirty minutes will cover key industry research findings.
all.zh: 前三十分鐘將分享重要的產業研究成果。

all.en: The next forty-five minutes will explore case studies from three sectors.
all.zh: 接下來四十五分鐘將深入三個產業的案例研究。

all.en: A live question and answer session will close the program.
all.zh: 活動將以現場問答時間作為結尾。

all.en: Attendees may submit questions through the on-screen chat feature.
all.zh: 與會者可透過畫面中的聊天功能提問。

all.en: A downloadable copy of the slide deck will be available after the event.
all.zh: 活動結束後將提供可下載的簡報檔。

all.en: Registered participants will also receive a recording within 48 hours.
all.zh: 已報名者亦將於 48 小時內收到錄影檔。

all.en: Continuing education credits are available for marketing professionals.
all.zh: 本場研討會可供行銷專業人士申請繼續教育學分。

all.en: To request your certificate, complete the survey sent after the webinar.
all.zh: 如需申請證書，請填寫研討會後寄送的問卷。

all.en: If you are unable to attend, you may cancel up to 24 hours in advance.
all.zh: 如無法出席，您可於開始前 24 小時內取消報名。

all.en: Please contact our support team if you do not receive your access link.
all.zh: 若您未收到參加連結，請聯絡我們的客服團隊。

all.en: Our team is available by email at events@brightpath.io.
all.zh: 我們的團隊提供電子郵件服務：events@brightpath.io。

all.en: We look forward to seeing you at the live session next Thursday.
all.zh: 期待下週四在線上研討會與您相見。
